title: Vilosoria

{{Quote|''[Koedi Raef]'' managed to have the ''Fireclaw'' delayed and Imperial garrison troops on Vilosoria, lacking reinforcements, were driven from the planet by the natives, who, with the coming of the warm seasons, had metamorphosized ''[sic]'' into powerful carnivores.|Personal addendum by General Airen Cracken to an entry of a datafile detailing Rebel Alliance operatives dedicated to R2z-DL|<ref name="CRO" />}}
'''Vilosoria''' was a [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] situated in the [[Lifh sector/Legends|Lifh sector]]. It was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Vilosorian]] [[Species/Legends|species]], which cycled between being docile beings and vicious [[Diet/Legends|carnivores]] based on the change of seasons on the planet. Vilosoria was invaded by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], which established a [[Garrison/Legends|garrison]] there. Not long thereafter, during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[R2z Starship Maintenance Droid|droid]] [[R2z-DL]] passed on information about Imperial activities in the [[Sector/Legends|sector]], the patrol routes and malfunction reports of the Empire's [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Interdictor cruiser]] ''[[Fireclaw]]'', and a description of the Vilosorians' changes to the Alliance [[Rebel pilot/Legends|pilot]] [[Koedi Raef]]. Raef used the information to redirect the ''Fireclaw'', leaving the garrison on Vilosoria without reinforcements, and subsequently the Alliance aided the transformed, carnivorous Vilosorians in [[Liberation of Vilosoria|liberating]] their homeworld.

==Description==
Vilosoria was a terrestrial [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="CRO" /> located in the [[Vilosoria system/Legends|Vilosoria system]], a part of the [[Lifh sector/Legends|Lifh sector]]<ref name="EAOC" /> in [[The Slice/Legends|the Slice]] portion of<ref name="TEA" /> the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]].<ref name="EAOC" /> Its seasons included [[Winter/Legends|winter]],<ref name="Shapeshifters">{{SW|url=news/hiding-in-plain-sight-star-wars-shapeshifters|text=Hiding in Plain Sight: ''Star Wars'' Shapeshifters|int=Hiding in Plain Sight: Star Wars Shapeshifters|nolive=1}}</ref> with the planet's seasonal cycle featuring an alternation of [[Temperature/Legends|cold]] and warm months.<ref name="CSWE Vilosoria">{{CSWECite|III|307|Vilosoria}}</ref>

==History==
{{Quote|One of the few astromech droids to have received the Rohal Cross for valor, Toozy is credited with actions that led to the ultimate liberation of Vilosoria.|Personal addendum by General Airen Cracken to an entry of a datafile detailing Rebel Alliance operatives dedicated to R2z-DL|<ref name="CRO" />}}
[[File:R2Z-DL-CRO.png|thumb|right|300px|R2z-DL (pictured) played a vital role in Vilosoria's liberation from the Galactic Empire.]]
The [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] at one point invaded Vilosoria,<ref name="CSWE Vilosoria" /> establishing a [[Garrison/Legends|garrison]] there.<ref name="CRO" /> Not long thereafter, however<ref name="CSWE Vilosoria" />—at some point by the [[Time/Legends|time]] shortly after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]—the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[R2z Starship Maintenance Droid|astromech droid]] and [[Spy/Legends|spy]] [[R2z-DL]], who was working undercover as a [[Starship/Legends|starship]] [[Astromech droid/Legends|maintenance droid]] on<ref name="CRO" /> the [[Bortele sector/Legends|Bortele sector]]<ref name="EAOC Hypotria">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} — Based on corresponding data for [[Hypotria system/Legends|Hypotria system]]</ref> planet [[Hypotria]], obtained<ref name="CRO" /> Imperial codes,<ref name="CSWE Fireclaw">{{CSWECite|I|274|''Fireclaw''}}</ref> information about the Empire's supply lines in the Lifh [[Sector/Legends|sector]], the patrol routes of the Imperial [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Interdictor cruiser]] ''[[Fireclaw]]'', reports on malfunctions in that [[Heavy cruiser/Legends|vessel's]] [[Gravity well projector/Legends|gravity well projectors]], and a description of the seasonal cycles underwent by Vilosoria's native [[Vilosorian]] [[Species/Legends|species]].<ref name="CRO" />

R2z-DL hid all of that information in a data packet in the [[Memory bank/Legends|memory banks]] of the [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wing starfighter]] of the Alliance [[Rebel pilot/Legends|pilot]] [[Koedi Raef]]. The latter discovered the data while she was traveling through the Lifh sector and,<ref name="CRO" /> as part of a Rebel attempt to [[Liberation of Vilosoria|liberate]] Vilosoria from Imperial control, used the provided codes to order the ''Fireclaw'' to remain in its position until its [[Gravity well/Legends|gravity well]] projectors could be repaired,<ref name="CSWE Fireclaw" /> therefore leaving the garrison on the planet without reinforcements.<ref name="CRO" /> Subsequently, with the aid of the Alliance,<ref name="CSWE Fireclaw" /> the Vilosorians, who had transformed into powerful [[Diet/Legends|carnivores]] upon the change of seasons on Vilosoria, were able to drive the garrison's [[Trooper/Legends|troops]] off-world, liberating their homeworld. Alliance [[General/Legends|General]] [[Airen Cracken/Legends|Airen Cracken]] later noted the role of R2z-DL—who was credited for his actions and received the Alliance's [[Rohal Cross]] for valor—in the liberation of Vilosoria in an entry dedicated to the [[Droid/Legends|droid]] that was part of a [[Datafile/Legends|datafile]] detailing various Rebel operatives.<ref name="CRO" />

==Inhabitants==
{{Quote|Koedi Raef, traveling through Lifh sector, discovered a hidden data packet in the memory banks of her Y-wing. It contained information about the Imperial supply line in the sector, patrol routes for the Interdictor cruiser ''Fireclaw'' ''[…]'', and a description of the seasonal cycles of the Vilosorians.|Personal addendum by General Airen Cracken to an entry of a datafile detailing Rebel Alliance operatives dedicated to R2z-DL|<ref name="CRO" />}}
Vilosoria was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] Vilosorian species, members of which underwent a seasonal cycle in which<ref name="CRO" /> during the winter<ref name="Shapeshifters" /> they were docile and calm beings while in the warmer months they turned into<ref name="CSWE Vilosoria" /> powerful,<ref name="CRO" /> vicious carnivores.<ref name="CSWE Vilosoria" /> During the Galactic Civil War, the Galactic Empire also maintained a garrison on the planet.<ref name="CRO" />

==Behind the scenes==
Vilosoria was created by [[Chuck Truett]] and was introduced in ''[[Cracken's Rebel Operatives]]'', a [[1994]] [[West End Games]] sourcebook published for use with ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="CRO" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Vilosoria [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the planet itself, in grid square R-8.<ref name="TEA" />
